title: VAN HAUH NA KEI AA HI ZO

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Vantungah innkhat nei-ing ni sangin taang zaw hi veh,
Khatvei ciang ka tung ding, Tua ciang bel ka khualzin hun,
Bei ding a tawlnga ta ning,
Aw tua niciang van ah thaman sang ning.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Van hauhna kei a hi zo,
A dang bang ka ngen nawn diam,
Pasian ta tu’n ka hizo, ka honpa Zeisu hang,
Lei ah ka hih thilthial hang,
Mite’n ka hauh lam thei lo,
Aw ka honpa hang mihaupi ka hita.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lukhu a kihawm niciang,
Hih leitung phawknawn kei ning,
Bangzah a nuam zen diam,
Ka lutung te zial zial ding,
Leinunna phawknawn kei ning,
Aw tua niciang kamai nibang tang ding.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka lam etna mikim in hong theihpih leh ut singmaw,
Pasian ta ka suahna,
Ka honpa hang kisa thei ing, van mite khat ka hizo,
Aw tua niciang aksi bang ka tang ding.
